source_metadata.description:
9 October 2025 | Transport and Infrastructure Committee
Land Transport (Clean Vehicle Standard) Amendment Bill (No 2)
Isuzu Utes New Zealand Limited & Renault New Zealand
	Ross Sommerville, General Manager
Imported Motor Vehicle Industry Association (VIA)
	Greig Epps, Chief Executive
